title: Your Ideas
description: A Mod is just for you!
body:

## Introduction
Maybe you have some interesting ideas but you can't achieve it?  
This Mod can help you!  
You can tell us your ideas [here](https://github.com/Netherite-QF/YourIdeas/issues)!
## List of Features
__*<font color=#708090> I hope this list will get longer and longer. —— Goulixiaoji, MaoMao, Darknight123MC</font>*__  

* Throwable Brick, Nether Brick  (which will make the entity feel Nausea), be careful not to swing at fragile blocks!  
* Throwable Fire Charge!
